title: HeadPing
body:
# HeadPing

**See every player's ping floating right above their nameplate — no tab menu required.**

---

## Features

- Displays each player's ping directly above their nametag in multiplayer
- Color-coded for instant readability:
  - 🟢 **Green** `< 50ms` — Excellent
  - 🟡 **Yellow** `50–99ms` — Good
  - 🟠 **Red** `100–299ms` — Fair
  - 🔴 **DarkRed** `300ms+` — Poor
- Only visible within 64 blocks
- Hidden while sneaking (respects vanilla nametag behavior)

---

## Perfect for Hoplite & PvP Servers

If you play on **Hoplite** or any other competitive PvP server, this mod gives you a real advantage in reading the room. Knowing who's lagging lets you:

- **Target high-ping players** — they're more likely to rubber-band and miss hits
- **Avoid trading** with low-ping players who have better hit registration
- **Gauge server stability** at a glance before committing to a fight

No more alt-tabbing to ping checkers or squinting at the tab menu mid-fight.

---

## Requirements

- Minecraft Java Edition (Fabric)
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

---

## Client-Side Only

This mod runs entirely on the client. No server-side installation needed — works on any server including Hoplite, Hypixel, and private SMP servers.
